observedSurfaces.evidence: The help text documents `Tab: toggle gameplay view and automap`, not a save/load route.
The help text lists movement, running, automap, zoom, follow, and quit controls; it exposes no save or load control.
The help note says `The launcher now starts in the gameplay view and can switch to automap on demand.`
The current launcher calls `const resources = await loadLauncherResources(iwadPath);` before optional map listing.
The current launcher calls `const session = createLauncherSession(resources, { mapName, skill, });` after parsing map, scale, and skill.
The current launcher calls `await runLauncherWindow(session, { scale, title: ... });` after creating the gameplay session.
